title: AnyRun report analysis 1
description: Dynamic analysis of malware can be conducted using public sandbox platforms such as ANY.RUN, which execute suspicious files in a controlled environment and record their behaviour.In this question, you are given a file hash and its corresponding sandbox report. Use the report to answer the questions that follow. What is the full command which adds a certain file to the Microsoft Defender exclusions?
hints: The process responsible for the operation is built-in windows scripting tool
In the process information section scroll down untill you find the process and copy its command line. Maybe Ctrl+f will help.
